---
name: v0.2 field feedback
about: Report a real incident-coding experience, an ambiguous/missing field, or a TO VERIFY resolution
title: "[feedback] "
labels: v0.2-review
---

<!-- Field experience is what moves the open TO VERIFY markers to resolved. Concrete beats abstract. -->

## What were you coding?
Deployer / RaaS operator / OEM / broker / carrier / researcher — and the kind of robot + incident (no confidential details needed).

## Where did the taxonomy fall short?
- [ ] A field was missing
- [ ] An enumerated value didn't fit (which field, what value did you need)
- [ ] A field/severity anchor was ambiguous
- [ ] A `TO VERIFY` marker — which one, and what the field answer should be
- [ ] Schema/validation problem (`schemas/rit-record-0.1.json`)
- [ ] Other

## Details
What you expected vs. what the taxonomy let you record. If you have a worked example record (redacted), paste it.

## Taxonomy version
v0.1 (tag). Note the rendered URL you were working from if relevant.
